title: Umami Fluffy Mexican Celeriac Tacos
description: Cozy, comforting tacos filled with fluffy celeriac and finished with a rich, savory umami sauce.
instructions: Mash 1 large celeriac and mix with 1 cup all-purpose flour, 1 teaspoon baking powder, and 1/2 teaspoon salt. Let rest for 10 minutes.
Divide dough into 8-10 equal pieces and roll each into a ball.
Heat 2 tablespoons vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add cumin seeds and cook for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Add onion and garlic to skillet and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add chipotle peppers in adobo, cumin, coriander, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add lime juice and cook until slightly thickened, about 2 minutes.
Add coconut cream and cook until warmed through, about 2 minutes.
Spoon a portion of celeriac mixture onto a corn tortilla, followed by a spoonful of queso fresco and a sprinkle of fresh cilantro.
Fold tortilla in half and serve with a dollop of sour cream and a slice of avocado on top.
Serve immediately and enjoy!
Serve with additional sour cream, avocado, and queso fresco if desired.
Cook cumin seeds in a small skillet over medium-high heat until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add chipotle peppers in adobo to skillet and cook for 1 minute, or until slightly charred.
Add onion and garlic to skillet and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add cumin, coriander, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add lime juice and cook until slightly thickened, about 2 minutes.
Add coconut cream and cook until warmed through, about 2 minutes.
Stir in chopped queso fresco and cook until melted and smooth.
Season with salt to taste.
Serve sauce over celeriac tacos, making sure each taco is coated in the sauce.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
